article_title: Burnaby Council — 11.1.1. 14805 Burnaby Parking Meter and Electric Vehicle Charging Meter Bylaw 2019 Amendment Bylaw No. 1 2026.pdf

briefs.title: Proposed: Burnaby to update EV charging meter rules and fee structures
briefs.summary: Council is set to vote on a bylaw amendment that would update how electric vehicle (EV) charging meters are defined and how drivers are charged — either by time or by energy used — at public EV charging spots in Burnaby.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council vote — if you operate EV charging or parking, review the new fee structure.
briefs.industries: Transportation & Logistics, Retail, Landlord & Property Mgmt
